title: Onboarding time trending down, team invites moving up
content:
Good progress this week. The simplified onboarding flow went live on Monday and early numbers are encouraging - new accounts are reaching their first milestone in about 5 days, down from 10. Not quite at our 3-day target yet, but trending the right way.

The two enterprise walkthroughs this week surfaced a pattern: customers want to invite their team earlier in the process but the current flow buries that step.

One thing to watch: the onboarding survey response rate is low. We may need to rethink how we ask for feedback.
next_steps: Move team invites up to day one in the onboarding flow. Explore alternative approaches for the onboarding survey to improve response rate.
